description_long: This object consists of two modern rifles, one black and one dark reddish-brown, stacked parallel to each other. The black rifle features a skeletonized stock, a pistol grip, a detachable box magazine, and a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. It is equipped with a compact optical sight mounted on the top rail. The reddish-brown rifle below has a similar tactical design, with a folding or collapsible stock, a pistol grip, and a detachable magazine, but its sighting system is less prominent. Both rifles have rails for accessory attachments and visible trigger guards. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving them a robust and tactical appearance. The surface finish is mostly matte with some slight gloss on certain parts, and the rifles are detailed with visible screws, magazine release buttons, and selector switches.
description: A pair of modern tactical rifles, one black and one reddish-brown, featuring skeletonized and collapsible stocks, suppressors, and optical sights, with detailed rails and magazines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profiles of both rifles, highlighting the stocks and barrels aligned in parallel.
description_view_1: Full side view displaying the entire length, stocks, magazines, and mounted optics of both rifles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the magazine wells and the rear of the stocks, with less detail on the optics.
description_view_3: Reverse side view showing the stocks and barrels from the opposite direction, with the black rifle's suppressor and sight more visible.
